description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious wooden deck that wraps around the front and side of the building. The facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living areas, as well as separate rooms along the back wall. The exterior is finished in white with wooden accents, and the deck is furnished with lounge chairs. A distinct, irregularly shaped swimming pool is positioned adjacent to the deck, separated by a small gap. The property is enclosed by a white railing, enhancing safety and visual appeal.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, a wraparound wooden deck, and an adjacent swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass facade, wooden deck with lounge chairs, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the deck, the glass windows, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white back wall with minimal windows and the pool positioned behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, lounge chairs, and the pool, with a clear view of the building's depth.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front-facing windows
